agent.name: Memory Garden Agent
agent.description: Chat-first knowledge agent that captures memories, connects related ideas, and keeps older notes resurfacing for review.

template.name: Memory Garden
template.description: A read-only visual knowledge map backed by local SQLite and operated through chat/API writes.

secrets.name: APP_PASSWORD
secrets.description: Optional password for HTTP Basic Auth on /app and /app/api/*.

api.description: Read the garden bundle, add memories, or mark resurfaced memories seen.
Create explicit links between two stored memories.
